meta.notes: Closed-form 2-scatterer along-LOS reference. Radar at ENU origin, target at +North 1 km, two scatterers at body offsets (0,0,0) and (1,0,0) m (= along +North at zero attitude), both 0 dBsm = 1 m^2. Amplitude per Mahafza monostatic ~ sqrt(sigma) / R^2. Round-trip phase = 4 pi R / lambda. Apparent centroid = amplitude-weighted barycenter of the two scatterer ENU positions. All expected values were generated bit-for-bit with the same float64 math the function under test uses (c = 299_792_458 m/s exact).
meta.source: Skolnik Radar Handbook 3e chap 18 (glint) + Mahafza Radar Systems Analysis ch.13 + plan/14 § 14.10.4
